entries.description: Registered session 1 (start_session, claude/anthropic/claude-fable-5); read spec, proposal, verdict (amendment 3), constitution preload.

Routed the empty-manifest design cluster (task_type=architecture; anthropic 400 x3 -> excluded, rerouted). Ruling: reader-level null->[] acceptance; no new classification union member (valid-empty = present with zero entries); textual empty-line replacement with the parse-after-append guard as backstop. Saved raw: s1-empty-manifest-architecture.json.

readModulesManifest: bare `modules:` (YAML null) now reads as a valid empty manifest ([]), silently, exactly like `modules: []`; missing/wrong-typed modules key keeps the warn+degrade path. classifyModulesManifest doc updated; authoring flows inherit empty-parity via pickModuleForAuthoring (no QuickPick, no stamp, no notice).

scaffoldNewModule: valid-empty manifests grow via replaceEmptyModulesList (top-level empty `modules:` line replaced with the first block-style entry, trailing comment preserved); parse-after-append guard retained as backstop and now passes the empty->first-entry transition; refusal wording updated for the shapes that still refuse.

MODULES_YAML_TEMPLATE exported: Set 087 header comments + commented example entries + `modules: []` (gpt-5-4 adopted shape). Round-trip test: classifies valid-empty, appender grows it into a one-module manifest preserving all comments. Wiring into scaffold/ensure-write stays Set 094.

Test matrix: classification (absent/invalid x5/empty-flow/empty-null/populated), appender transitions (both empty forms, trailing comment, no-EOL, template), all-dropped refusals (block + flow style, ruling mandate 3), populated flow-style refusal, pickModuleForAuthoring empty-parity, copyPlanningPrompt byte-identical to no-manifest baseline, importPlanFromFile repo-level destination, bare-modules attribution/byte-stability pin on readSessionSets, runNewModuleFlow over the template.

Build + full suite green: extension unit/Layer 2 1368 passing; Layer 1 pytest 2922 passed / 6 skipped; Layer 3 Playwright 20 passed (npm run test:playwright, L-064-12). Lint: 7 pre-existing errors in files this session did not touch (identical on the pristine tree via stash check); touched files 0 errors.

Cross-provider verification (gpt-5-6): R1 Major (root-indented empty forms not appendable) -> fixed (indent captured, block re-indented, e2e tests); R2 Major (nested modules: key could swallow the replacement) -> fixed (one candidate per matching line, each validated against the parse-after-append guard, ROOT list wins, e2e tests); R3 Major (explicit null spellings accepted by reader but not appendable) -> fixed (regex mirrors YAML 1.2 core null spellings, e2e tests incl. nUll-stays-invalid). Suite re-run green after each fix.

R4 Major (quoted keys + multiline empty flow) DISPUTED as edge-case exhaustion (fresh serialization of the same semantic state each round; prescribed CST fix re-litigates the settled routed architecture ruling; failure mode is a loud no-write refusal). Constitution path: third-provider opinion (gemini-pro, saved raw at s1-third-opinion-empty-forms.json) -> ADJUDICATED-MINOR RESIDUAL: quoted-key hardening applied + test-pinned (quote style preserved); exotic serializations refuse loudly by design; residual documented and deferred to Sets 092-094 manifest guardrails.

R5 with the cross-round issue ledger + adjudication in the conventions block: VERIFIED, zero findings. Unit suite 1372 passing; tsc + eslint clean on touched files; dist rebuilt. Total verification cost ~$0.74 across 5 rounds.

disposition.json authored (status completed, verdict VERIFIED preserved, next_orchestrator per routed analysis: claude-code/anthropic/claude-opus-4-8/medium, adjudication recorded, lessons cited L-064-8 L-064-9 L-065-1); ai-assignment actuals updated; commit + push + close_session + notification.
